title: Chef Aid Kitchen and Pantry Scoops, Set of 4 Scoops Perfect for Measuring a Wide Range of Kitchen Foods, Each Scoop has a Measuring Spoon Built into The Handle for Multi use, Dishwasher Safe
features: MULTI-USE: These Kitchen Food Scoops are an ideal way to quickly, easily and accurately measure a wide variety of foods including Flour, Sugars, Wheats, Rice and many other items, they are also perfect for use accross the pantry when preparing Pet feed and meausing washing detergent from the box
PANTRY SCOOPS: These strong plastic Scoops hold and measure 1/4 Cup, 1/3 Cup, 1/2 Cup and Full Cup
MEASURING SPOONS: The Measuring Spoons are intergrated in the handles of thesccops which make these dual use and space saving, the Spoons Measuring 1/4 TSP, 1/2 TSP, 1TSP and 1 TBS
SPACE SAVING: This set is contains multi use toolds that can also stack when not in use which makes that a space saving set
CHEF AID: Chef Aid offers an extensive range of products for the Kitchen and Home that are affordable without compromising on quality
Thoroughly wash products in hot soapy water before first use, rinse and dry
Use clips to hold scoops/spoons together when not in use
Measures 36 cm length by 23 cm width by 13 cm height
